parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "Project Manager" as PM
participant ":ProjectManagerUI" as UI
participant "AGVServer" as Server
participant "AGVServerThread" as ServerThread
participant "AVGManagerController" as Controller
participant "AGVDigitalTwinServer" as TwinServer
participant "AGVDigitalTwinThread" as TwinThread
participant "AGVDigitalTwinController" as TwinController
participant "CodingAndDecoding2" as Codec

activate PM
PM -> UI : Wants to assign ready to go Orders to an AGV
activate UI
UI -> Server : message
activate Server
Server -> Server : accept
Server -> ServerThread : start
activate ServerThread
ServerThread -> Codec : Decoding(r)
activate Codec
Codec -> ServerThread : Message
ServerThread -> Controller : FifoAGV()
activate Controller
Controller -> Controller : findavailableOrder()
activate Controller
deactivate Controller

loop until orderList is empty
    Controller -> Controller : findavailableAGV(weight,volume)
    activate Controller
    deactivate Controller
    Controller -> Controller : createTaskandSave(description,order,agv)
    activate Controller
    deactivate Controller
    Controller -> Controller : doTask()
    activate Controller
    deactivate Controller
    Controller -> TwinServer : message
    activate TwinServer
    TwinServer -> TwinServer : accept
    TwinServer -> TwinThread : start
    activate TwinThread
    TwinThread -> Codec : Decoding(r)
    activate Codec
    Codec -> TwinThread : message
    deactivate Codec
    TwinThread -> TwinController : doTask(taskPerform)
    activate TwinController
    TwinController -> TwinThread : TaskReportMessage
    deactivate TwinController
    TwinThread -> TwinServer : TaskReportMessage
    deactivate TwinThread
    TwinServer -> Controller : TaskReportMessage
    deactivate TwinServer
end

Controller -> ServerThread : ResponseMessage
deactivate Controller
ServerThread --> Server : ResponseMessage
deactivate ServerThread
activate Server
Server -> UI : ResponseMessage
deactivate Server
UI -> PM : Informs operation success
deactivate UI
deactivate PM

@enduml
```
